hints.text: Australian external territory SSW of Java (counts as Australia); car = a unique **silver pickup w/ its truck bed visible** — usually all you need to ID (don't confuse w/ Cocos Islands)
Mostly dense **tropical forest**; some unpaved roads have bright **white sandy soil**; palms in places
Standard **Australian bollard** (white, red front / grey back reflector); Aussie speed signs & green sign backgrounds
Built-up areas in the **NE**; a boat trekker hugs the steep rocky north coast (white deck pokes through the blur); many trail trekkers in dense foliage
Famous for **red crabs** (trekker among hundreds near Ethel Beach; crab references on signs); harbour recognisable by large **cranes**
